title: Tide Extremes Response
description: Schema for the Stormglass API tide extremes response. Contains high and low tide events with timestamps and heights.

data.description: List of tide extreme events in the requested time range

TideExtremePoint.description: A single tide extreme (high or low) event

height.description: Tide height in meters relative to the specified datum

time.description: Timestamp in UTC when this tide extreme occurs

type.description: Whether this is a high tide or low tide event

TideStation.description: Information about the tide station used for calculations

distance.description: Distance between the tide station and the requested coordinate in km

source.description: Organization that operates the tide station

TideMetaData.description: Metadata about the tide request including station information and quota

datum.description: The datum used for tidal measurements

end.description: End timestamp of the requested data range

requestCount.description: Total number of API calls made today

start.description: Start timestamp of the requested data range
